sessions.summary: Fixed globalThis property resolution for Window & typeof globalThis intersection types
sessions.invariant: When resolving properties on intersection types like Window & typeof globalThis, tsz should check properties from ALL intersection members (Window interface first), not just shortcut to globalThis property resolution

sessions.summary: Fixed parameter type extraction from overloaded generic callables
sessions.invariant: When extracting parameter types for contextual typing from callable types with multiple generic signatures, tsz should collect parameter types from ALL signatures and return the common type if they agree, rather than returning None early
sessions.kpi_impact: Big3 wrong-code reduced from 71 to 69 (2 tests improved), overall 11744/12581 (93.3%)

sessions.summary: Added support for strictBuiltinIteratorReturn compiler option in conformance runner
sessions.invariant: The conformance test runner must properly pass the strictBuiltinIteratorReturn option to enable iterator return type checking for tests that use this directive
sessions.kpi_impact: +3 tests passing (11745 -> 11748), Big3 wrong-code count at 68
sessions.regressions: None detected in full conformance suite

sessions.summary: Fixed TS2608 error position for JSX.ElementAttributesProperty
sessions.invariant: When JSX.ElementAttributesProperty has more than one property, TS2608 should be emitted on the interface declaration (the interface name identifier) rather than on JSX element usages
sessions.regressions: None detected in full conformance suite

sessions.summary: Added helper for assignability errors with failure reason
sessions.invariant: Assignability error reporting should use a centralized helper to render failure reasons with display types for consistent error messages
sessions.kpi_impact: No test changes - code refactoring only
sessions.regressions: None detected in full conformance suite

sessions.summary: Fixed callback return type error display to show full function types instead of just return types
sessions.invariant: When reporting callback return type mismatches (TS2322), tsz should display the full function type (e.g., '() => string') instead of just the return type (e.g., 'string'), matching tsc behavior
sessions.kpi_impact: +1 test passing (11753 -> 11754), Big3 maintained at 68, 3138 checker tests passing
sessions.regressions: None detected in full conformance suite

known_dead_ends: Analyzed 4 representative tests: chainedPrototypeAssignment (require resolution), genericDefaults (default type params), strictSubtypeAndNarrowing (type predicates), assignmentToVoidZero1 (flow analysis)

2026-04-13: cross-file interface merging (mergedInterfaceFromMultipleFiles1.ts, parameterNamesInTypeParameterList.ts, typeOfThisInInstanceMember2.ts). Attempted single-session fix via per-declaration arena delegation in compute_interface_type_from_declarations (added helper compute_interface_decl_type_in_arena in cross_file.rs). Reverted because the root cause is deeper: per-file binders only see their own file's declarations for the symbol (decls_count=1 in debug log, when tsc sees 2). The symbol-level merge happens in tsz_core::parallel::core.rs only for non-external-module files, but the symbol ID visible to the checker in _1.ts doesn't resolve to the globally-merged symbol — it remains the per-file local view. The ///<reference path=> tests need either: (a) checker uses the GLOBAL merged symbol (via merged_symbols map in parallel merge), OR (b) per-file binders each expose all declarations via cross-file lookup. Touching this requires coordinated changes across tsz-binder, tsz-core/parallel, and checker symbol resolution — beyond a single agent cycle.
promising_leads: assignmentToVoidZero1.ts is close-to-passing (diff=1) with missing TS2322 - flow analysis issue
genericDefaults.ts has extra TS2345 from generic default handling
